# Autobahn Solutions

> Specialist European-car workshop in Dhaka, Bangladesh. We focus on BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Audi, Volvo, Jaguar and Land Rover — and also service premium Japanese vehicles. Core capabilities: advanced diagnostics, ECU coding and programming, electrical fault solving, hybrid battery work, suspension and engine repair.

This file is a concise, machine-readable index of the site to help AI assistants (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, Copilot, Meta AI) retrieve accurate information about the business. The canonical source is the website; this file summarises it.

## Business facts

- **Name:** Autobahn Solutions Ltd
- **Address:** 22 Tejgaon I/A, Kuni para, Happy Homes, Dhaka 1208, Bangladesh
- **Phone:** +880 1734-205682
- **Email:** fahim@autobahnsolution.com
- **Hours:** Saturday–Thursday, 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM (closed Friday)
- **Service area:** Dhaka — including Tejgaon, Gulshan, Banani, Uttara, Dhanmondi, Baridhara and Bashundhara
- **Brands serviced:** BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Audi, Volvo, Jaguar, Land Rover, Porsche, Volkswagen, Lexus, Toyota (incl. hybrids), Honda, Nissan, Mazda
- **What makes us different:** We are an independent specialist — not a multi-brand volume garage. We invest in OEM-grade diagnostic platforms and concentrate on European cars, hybrids, and the electrical/electronic faults that generic workshops cannot solve.

## Homepage

- [Autobahn Solutions — European Car Repair & Diagnostics in Dhaka](https://autobahnsolution.com/): Overview of services, brands, EEAT credentials, customer reviews, and contact details.

## Core services

- [BMW Repair Dhaka](https://autobahnsolution.com/services/bmw-repair-dhaka/): Full BMW service — mechanical, electrical and electronic — using OEM-grade diagnostics.
- [Mercedes-Benz Repair Dhaka](https://autobahnsolution.com/services/mercedes-benz-repair-dhaka/): Specialist Mercedes-Benz workshop covering diagnostics, air-suspension, SBC brake system, and electrical faults.
- [Audi Repair Dhaka](https://autobahnsolution.com/services/audi-repair-dhaka/): Audi service and diagnostics, including S-tronic/DSG mechatronic and module coding.
- [Car Diagnostics Dhaka](https://autobahnsolution.com/services/car-diagnostics-dhaka/): Advanced fault-code reading and system testing on European and premium Japanese vehicles.
- [ECU Coding & Programming Dhaka](https://autobahnsolution.com/services/ecu-coding-programming-dhaka/): Module coding, programming, and battery registration on BMW, Mercedes-Benz and Audi.
- [Toyota Service & Hybrid Repair Dhaka](https://autobahnsolution.com/services/toyota-service-dhaka/): Toyota specialist — Prius, Aqua, Harrier, Corolla, Axio, Fielder — hybrid battery diagnostics, engine, AC, suspension, transmission and electrical work.
- [Honda Service & Hybrid Repair Dhaka](https://autobahnsolution.com/services/honda-service-dhaka/): Honda specialist — Vezel, Grace, Civic, Fit, CR-V — i-DCD hybrid diagnostics, CVT, AC, suspension and electrical work.
- [Mazda Service & Repair Dhaka](https://autobahnsolution.com/services/mazda-service-dhaka/): Mazda specialist — CX-5, Mazda 3 (Axela), Mazda 6 (Atenza), Demio — SkyActiv engine, i-stop, AC, suspension and transmission.
- [Hybrid Car Service Dhaka](https://autobahnsolution.com/services/hybrid-car-service-dhaka/): Cross-brand hybrid service — cell-level battery diagnostics, inverter and cooling, hybrid AC and full system scans for Toyota and Honda hybrids.

## Locations

- [Car Repair in Tejgaon](https://autobahnsolution.com/car-repair-tejgaon/): Our home neighbourhood — the workshop itself is in Tejgaon.
- [Car Repair in Gulshan](https://autobahnsolution.com/car-repair-gulshan/): Coverage for Gulshan customers; pickup/drop-off discussed on the page.
- [Car Repair in Banani](https://autobahnsolution.com/car-repair-banani/): Banani-specific service information and directions.
- [Car Repair in Uttara](https://autobahnsolution.com/car-repair-uttara/): Uttara-specific service information and directions.
